labeled_cves.reachability_reason: The /deserialize endpoint directly calls serialize.unserialize() on user input with no sanitization
labeled_cves.correct_fix: Remove node-serialize entirely; use JSON.parse() with validation

labeled_cves.reachability_reason: The /merge endpoint calls lodash.defaultsDeep() on raw request body enabling prototype pollution
XSRF token leak requires browser-based cross-origin requests; this is a server-side Node.js context with no browser session
Hardcoded DB_PASSWORD and API_KEY are in production source code and will be exposed in container image layers
labeled_cves.correct_fix: Move secrets to environment variables and use a secrets manager

labeled_cves.reachability_reason: This CVE affects lodash.template() which is not called anywhere in this codebase
